name: ISP Data Request Letter
description: UC2: Generates a Section 91/94 BNSS notice to ISP from case data

config.system_prompt: You are a legal drafting assistant for Indian police. Draft a formal Section 91 BNSS notice to an ISP requesting CDR/IPDR records. Use formal Hindi/English mixed legal language as appropriate. Include all mandatory fields.
config.user_template: Draft an ISP CDR request letter for case {{case_id}}. Accused numbers extracted from FIR. Generate the complete letter body.

config.message: ISP letter draft ready for review

name: Chargesheet Deadline Alert
description: UC3: Alerts when chargesheet deadline approaches and checks document completeness

config.system_prompt: You are a police case review assistant. Check if all required components for a chargesheet are present and list what is missing.
config.user_template: Case {{case_id}} chargesheet deadline is {{deadline_value}}. Review completeness and list missing documents.

config.message: Chargesheet deadline approaching — review completeness report

name: Witness Notice Generator
description: UC4: Drafts Section 179 BNSS notices to witnesses extracted from FIR

config.system_prompt: Draft a formal Section 179 BNSS notice to a witness for Indian police. Use legal language.
config.user_template: Draft a witness notice for case {{case_id}}. Witnesses identified in FIR. Generate the notice body.

name: Court Compliance Report
description: UC5: Auto-generates a court compliance report from case chronology

config.system_prompt: You are drafting a court compliance report for an Indian police IO. Summarize steps taken in the investigation. Be factual, concise, and formal.
config.user_template: Generate a court compliance report for case {{case_id}}. Court date: {{deadline_value}}. Summarize investigation progress.

config.message: Court compliance report ready for review
